## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory interview with Maricela Garcia for an Executive Assistant position at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Maricela has 15+ years of experience as a virtual assistant and EA, with strong skills in calendar management, email handling, and adapting to fast-paced environments](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3082.0)
  - [growthx.ai is a rapidly growing content agency (40 customers, $7M ARR) with AI-driven backend, seeking EAs for multiple executives](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
  - [Primary need is for an EA to support the CEO with complex scheduling, travel, and communication management across multiple platforms](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=2906.0)
  - [Maricela demonstrated resourcefulness and problem-solving skills, which align well with the company's dynamic nature](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3436.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview

  - [growthx.ai is a content agency using AI workflows for efficient content production and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=2564.0)
  - Founded \<1 year ago, $7M annual revenue, 40 US-based customers
  - [45 employees globally, leadership team on West Coast (Pacific hours)](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=2658.0)
  - [Bridget McGillivray recently joined as head of operations (2.5 months ago)](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=2748.0)

### EA Role Requirements

  - [Primary need: EA for CEO to manage complex schedule, travel, and communication](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=2906.0)
  - [CEO heavily involved in sales, customer calls, and investor relations](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=2887.0)
  - [Need for "strategic partner" to anticipate needs, prioritize, and optimize CEO's time](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=2873.0)
  - [Additional EA roles for other executives (sales, marketing, content, operations)](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3025.0)

### Maricela's Background

  - [15+ years experience in virtual assistance and EA roles](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3082.0)
  - [Worked with multiple executives, managing emails, calendars, and admin tasks](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3121.0)
  - [8 years in real estate company: sales, admin, transaction coordination](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3153.0)
  - [7 years in insurance agency: email management, CEO support, travel planning](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3234.0)
  - [Strong skills in adapting to changing environments and processes](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3361.0)

### Work Approach and Problem-Solving

  - [Emphasizes constant communication with executives and team members](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3476.0)
  - [Uses time-blocking for task management and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3540.0)
  - [Example of resourcefulness: Brought in additional help for large data entry project](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3693.0)
  - [Focuses on delivering high-quality work, even when delegating tasks](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3797.0)

### Feedback and Growth

  - [Constructive feedback: Balancing speed with accuracy in calendar management](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3849.0)
  - [Positive feedback: Finding innovative solutions for large-scale projects](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3930.0)
  - [Incorporated feedback by developing templates and checklists for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=3993.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to discuss Maricela's profile with the leadership team](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=4097.0)
  - [Determine best fit for Maricela among the 5 executives needing EA support](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=4097.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up interview with the potential direct supervisor](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=4097.0)
  - [Maricela is immediately available to start if selected](https://fathom.video/share/dpbmESS5cixHcw7_i1AexNfu3P7tSzBD?tab=summary&timestamp=4093.0)
